title: eragrostis lehmanniana var. chaunantha
intro: Eragrostis lehmanniana var. chaunantha, also known as Indian Cup Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Eragrostis lehmanniana var. chaunantha is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
